zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Sandford I於1400年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Richard de Sandford30歲，母親Maude Banaster35歲。他於大約1423年與Julianna de Corbet在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1451年4月2日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.Hadnall, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾哈德納爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Sandford I于1400年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Richard de Sandford30岁，母亲Maude Banaster35岁。他于大约1423年与Julianna de Corbet在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1451年4月2日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sandford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Sandford I was born in 1400, in Shropshire, England, his father, Richard de Sandford, was 30 and his mother, Maude Banaster, was 35. He married Julianna de Corbet about 1423, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 2 April 1451, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Sandford I est né en 1400, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Sandford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maude Banaster, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Julianna de Corbet environ 1423, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1451, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Sandford I 1400 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Sandford 30 und seine Mutter Maude Banaster 35. Er hat um 1423 in Shropshire, England Julianna de Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 2. April 1451 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sandford I è nato il nel 1400 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Sandford, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maude Banaster, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Julianna de Corbet circa 1423, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 2 aprile 1451, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Sandford Iが1400年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard de Sandfordは30歳，母Maude Banasterは35歳であった。約1423年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでJulianna de Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1451年4月2日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Sandford I(이)가 1400년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Sandford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude Banaster(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1423년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Julianna de Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1451년 4월 2일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Horseley, Staffordshire, England: Horsley, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sandford I nasceu em 1400, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Sandford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maude Banaster, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Julianna de Corbet aproximadamente 1423, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1451, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Sandford I родился в 1400 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Sandford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Banaster, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Julianna de Corbet около 1423 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 2 апреля 1451 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Sandford I nació en 1400, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Sandford, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maude Banaster, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Julianna de Corbet aproximadamente 1423, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 2 de abril de 1451, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
